## Summary
Follow-up to PR #12 \(scaffold\). Addresses issues found in retroactive pr-toolkit review.

- Remove insecure default `secret_key` — now required via `SECRET_KEY` env var
- Fix `get_db` return type annotation to `Generator[Session, None, None]`
- Use `TEST_DATABASE_URL` env var in conftest to prevent accidental production DB access
- Fix Dockerfile: regular install instead of editable for production containers
- Clear hardcoded URL in alembic.ini \(env.py sets it from settings\)
- Add `*.sqlite-wal` and `*.sqlite-shm` to .gitignore
- Run ruff format on model files

## Test plan
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] App requires SECRET_KEY to start

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

"$GH" issue create --repo Techne-Analytics/lunchbox --title "chore: add CI/CD protections and security scanning" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## What
Add comprehensive CI/CD protections to enforce code quality and prevent errors from reaching main.

## Tasks
- [ ] Branch protection rules on main \(require PR, require status checks, no force push\)
- [ ] Docker build verification in PR workflow
- [ ] pip-audit for dependency vulnerability scanning
- [ ] pytest-cov with minimum coverage threshold
- [ ] Alembic migration consistency check
- [ ] Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates

## Why
Current CI only runs lint + tests. Need to prevent build breaks, catch security vulnerabilities, track coverage, and enforce the PR workflow at the GitHub level.
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
